use_cases.temple_wall: ancient alien temple wall covered in a consistent sacred glyph language, weathered stone, chipped carvings, ritual geometry
use_cases.relic_object: alien relic engraved with coherent inscriptions wrapping around the object, ancient-futuristic, strange and meaningful
use_cases.biotech_interface: luminous biotech interface displaying a cohesive written glyph script, tightly organized short strings, circular clusters, signal-language aesthetic
use_cases.circular_seal: circular alien seal composed of a central sacred sigil surrounded by rings of consistent written glyphs, asymmetrical near-symmetry, elegant and uncanny
use_cases.ruin_fragment: fragment of alien inscription on broken stone, damaged but clearly rule-based script, weathered, enigmatic
